title: Subitem notifictions
excerpt:
Is it possible to set an alert using automations for a single subitem, irrespective of owner/person column? 
Specifically, I have a task loaded in Monday and want an alert, only on that one subitem, to be sent to me a we…

posts.author: Courtney (Mann)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is it possible to set an alert using automations for a single subitem, irrespective of owner/person column?

Specifically, I have a task loaded in Monday and want an alert, only on that one subitem, to be sent to me a week before

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Courtney,

Is this recipe along the lines of what you’re looking for?

Screen Shot 2023-09-27 at 1.25.30 pm1186×860 43.7 KB

posts.author: Courtney (Mann)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey there - in theory yes, but not across a board, only for a single item (or in this case, subitem)
